updates.title: What is LPG subsidy? Know rules, eligibility and how to spot fake LPG delivery messages and avoid scams | Explained
updates.summary: State-run oil companies are verifying LPG consumers' income to cut subsidy burden. Those with incomes over  ₹10 lakh may lose benefits. Consumers must respond within seven days to avoid cancellation. The move follows stricter checks with the Income Tax Department to identify ineligible recipients.

updates.title: Post office savings: Can ₹10 lakh FD and ₹10,000 RD create ₹1 crore in 20 yrs? Check how inflation impacts returns
updates.summary: A  ₹10 lakh post office FD earning 7.5% and a  ₹10,000 monthly recurring deposit earning 6.7% can grow into a corpus close to  ₹1 crore over 20 years through compounding. However, inflation may significantly reduce the real value of these returns, making long-term planning and diversification crucial.
